stories.title: Carolina's jock and nerd alliance created perfect ...
stories.summary: Coach Rod Brind'Amour and GM Eric Tulsky blended the perfect recipe, creating a team that won its first Cup in 20 years -- and will be back for more.

stories.title: Hurricanes win Game 6, raise Cup for second time
stories.summary: Taylor Hall and Jackson Blake each scored their seventh goal of the playoffs, and Nikolaj Ehlers had an empty-net tally, as the Carolina Hurricanes topped the Vegas Golden Knights 3-0 in Game 6 of the Stanley Cup Final on Sunday, the club's second title.

stories.title: Hurricanes' Staal, 37, oldest Conn Smythe winner
stories.summary: Hurricanes captain Jordan Staal became the oldest player to win the Conn Smythe Trophy at age 37.

stories.title: Gaethje bucks odds, Topuria to claim UFC title
stories.summary: Justin Gaethje outslugged and outlasted Ilia Topuria, forcing the heavy favorite to retire on his stool at the end of Round 4 on his way to capturing the undisputed UFC lightweight championship.

stories.title: UFC's Strickland removed from Freedom 250 fest
stories.summary: Middleweight champion Sean Strickland was removed from the UFC Freedom 250's Fan Fest near the White House "for his own and public safety," according to authorities.
